news.t: Schwab Ramps Up Competition With 4 New ETF Fee Cuts
Schwab Asset Management Reduces Fees on Four Equity Index ETFs
US adds Chinese solar, battery firms to list of military-linked companies
Nikkei 225 leads Asian markets lower as Middle East tensions hit sentiment
Are Asia small caps overlooked winners in regional equity markets in 2026?
House lawmakers introducing bill to toughen US ban on Chinese vehicles
8 Funds to Consider if China's Efforts to Revive Economy Gain Traction

holdings.infoBox: SCHE is an equity ETF with a total of 2206 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 16.79%, Tencent Holdings at 3.33%, Alibaba Group Holding at 2.29%, MediaTek at 1.91%, and Delta Electronics at 1.24%.

overview.description: The Schwab Emerging Markets Equity ETF (SCHE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Emerging index. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap companies across emerging markets. Securities in the index are selected and weighted based on their market capitalization. SCHE was launched on Jan 14, 2010 and is issued by Charles Schwab.
